title: Amtech S2929 Small Handheld Pocket Magnifying Glass with Auto On/Off LED Light, 8x Magnification, Compact Telescopic/Sliding Design, Ideal for Reading, Inspection, Hobbies & Crafts
features: LED LIGHT: This handy 8x telescopic pocket magnifier has a convenient auto on/off LED light
VERSATILE: With a 0.35mm Ø lens, it is ideal for a wide range of hobby, DIY and general household uses
BATTERIES INCLUDED: It is supplied with 3 x LR44 alkaline batteries
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product description This Amtech S2929 lightweight pocket magnifying glass has a compact telescopic/sliding design to easily fit in a pocket. With 8x magnification and a bright auto on/off LED light, it provides excellent illumination in low light conditions. The pocket magnifier is ideal for reading, inspection, hobbies and crafts. Safety Warning No
